events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Borussia Dortmund

headlines.description: Serhou Guirassy scored four goals to lead Borussia Dortmund to a 6-0 demolition of Union Berlin in the Bundesliga on Saturday and earn their first league win under new coach Niko Kovac.
headlines.shortLinkText: Guirassy nets four in BVB's rout of Union Berlin
